title: Rich Roasted Mediterranean Vegetable Wrap
description: A flavorful and healthy flexitarian dish featuring roasted Mediterranean vegetables wrapped in a fluffy flatbread with salted butter, perfect for a satisfying lunch or snack. This recipe combines the best of Mediterranean cuisine with the comfort of a warm wrap.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the sliced eggplant, zucchini, red bell pepper, and red onion with a tablespoon of olive oil, salt, and pepper until they are evenly coated.
Spread the vegetables out in a single layer on a large baking sheet and roast in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until they are tender and lightly browned.
While the vegetables are roasting, melt one tablespoon of salted butter in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Brush the melted butter onto the flatbread pieces, then wrap each piece around a steamer basket lined with a large leaf of lettuce or spinach.
Steam the wrapped flatbread for 2-3 minutes, or until it is warm and pliable.
To assemble the wraps, spread a quarter of the roasted vegetables onto the center of each flatbread, then top with a sprinkle of feta cheese, a few kalamata olives, and a sprinkle of chopped parsley.
Fold the bottom edge of the flatbread up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
Serve the wraps warm, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
